dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated 'opens above previous day's range' as open > prev_high (upper boundary of previous range). Translated 'builds further in that direction' as close > open (continuation of upward movement). Exit condition uses reversal logic (close < open) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Set hold_days_max to 1 since signal focuses on intraday price action during first ticks after opening.

backtest_rule.reason: Translated 'opens above previous day's range' as open > prev_high (upper boundary of previous range). Translated 'builds further in that direction' as close > open (continuation of upward movement). Exit condition uses reversal logic (close < open) since AUTHOR_SILENT. Set hold_days_max to 1 since signal focuses on intraday price action during first ticks after opening.

source_rule_text: When price opens above the previous day's range and builds further in that direction, expect higher levels during the day due to active participant behavior.
